name: borye--xiaohongshu-mcp
description: Automate Xiaohongshu (RedNote) content operations using a Python client for the xiaohongshu-mcp server. Use for: (1) Publishing image, text, and video content, (2) Searching for notes and trends, (3) Analyzing post details and comments, (4) Managing user profiles and content feeds. Triggers: xiaohongshu automation, rednote content, publish to xiaohongshu, xiaohongshu search, social media management.
